about.mission: To produce 10 different varieties of quality and healthy foods by year 2025.
about.vision: To provide not just a living but to extend blessing, sharing grace through nutritious, flavorful, and proudly Filipino-made local products.
about.story: Gift of Grace Food Manufacturing Corporation began its journey in 2015, born from a mother's passion for creating Korean kimchi infused with a flavor profile tailored to the Filipino taste. What started as a humble home-based business sharing products with neighbors soon grew beyond the household, reaching the local community, the online market, and eventually well-known retail chains such as SM, Savemore, Puregold, Robinsons, and Super8.
